title: Game-related Website
description: A website to help Warframe players on different aspects of their games.
details:
**Features:**

- Inventory management and optimization
- Build tracking and sharing
- Real-time game data integration

**Architecture:**

- **Backend:** FastAPI with PostgreSQL for data persistence
- **Frontend:** Vue 3 with TypeScript for a responsive UI
- **API:** RESTful design with automatic OpenAPI documentation

title: RPG in C
description: A school project, coding a video game using C, from scratch (and with SDL2).
details:
**Gameplay:**

- Turn-based combat system
- Inventory and equipment management
- Multiple enemy types with different behaviors
- Save / load game functionality

**Technical Details:**

- Custom game loop and event handling
- Manual memory management
- Sprite rendering with SDL2 textures
- Collision detection system

title: TODO App
description: An Android app in Java to handle TODOs, sending notifications and handling tags.
details:
**Features:**

- Create, edit, and delete tasks with ease
- Tag-based organization system
- Push notifications for upcoming deadlines
- Persistent local storage
- Material Design UI

**Implementation:**

- Built with Android SDK and Java
- SQLite database for offline storage
- AlarmManager for scheduled notifications
- RecyclerView with custom adapter patterns

title: AI to play Pacman
description: An AI, which plays Pacman, recreated in Unity.
details:
**AI Behavior:**

- Pathfinding algorithm to navigate the maze
- Decision-making for ghost evasion and pellet collection
- Prioritisation of power pellets to turn the tide

**Technical Details:**

- Built with Unity 2D and Universal Render Pipeline
- Custom C# scripts for game logic and AI
- Unity Input System for optional manual controls
- 2D sprite-based rendering with lit materials
